title: Darwin IV Ad Astra integration
description: It adds the planet Darwin IV from the mod Darwin IV Mod by SavaAlienFish as a planet in the mod Ad Astra.
body:
Ads the planet Darwin IV from the mod [Darwin IV mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/darwin-iv-mod) to [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra). (obviously these two mods need to be installed with all their dependencies)

There is a resource pack that you need to download to, just click in the text of the version you are gonna download and scroll down, you'll see the data pack zip and the resource pack zip, download both.
